title: Add NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE build arg to frontend Dockerfile
description: Add ARG NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://backend:8000/api/v1 and ENV NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=$NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE to the builder stage of frontend/Dockerfile BEFORE the 'RUN npm run build' line. This ensures nuxt.config.ts image.alias evaluates to 'http://backend:8000/media' at build time so Nuxt Image IPX fetches media files from the backend container via internal Docker network, resolving IPX_FILE_NOT_FOUND errors for product images including files with Cyrillic filenames.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/Dockerfile builder stage has ARG NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://backend:8000/api/v1 before npm run build
frontend/Dockerfile builder stage has ENV NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=$NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE before npm run build
docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < frontend/Dockerfile passes with no errors
